items.title: Jim Cramer Says It Seems OpenAI Wants To Go Public 'Real Soon' But Wonders If There's 'Enough Money Around' With SpaceX And Anthropic Vying For Funds
items.body:
Jim Cramer said Monday he believes OpenAI may be preparing to go public soon, while warning that investor capital could become stretched amid growing demand for exposure to leading artificial intelligence companies.



Cramer said in a post on X that OpenAI appears ready to go public “real soon,” adding that there may not be “enough money around” to support major AI players
